data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — existing test-check-shim-refs.sh has 9 tests, validate.sh already wires check-shim-refs.sh. Need to add test_validate_runs_shim_refs_check and test_precommit_blocks_shim_violation to test-check-shim-refs.sh. Pre-commit config does NOT have shim-refs hook wiring.
